title: Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji Break Through
description: On pages 13–14, this part follows Unknown person #1, Fake Straw Hat Pirates, Narrator, Rayleigh, Luffy, Zoro, Sanji. The core story beat is luffy, zoro, and sanji break through.
scene: The scene centers on luffy, zoro, and sanji break through, with Unknown person #1, Fake Straw Hat Pirates, Narrator, Rayleigh, Luffy, Zoro, Sanji driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No, I snapped the bastard's neck!!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: The real deal!!! They're totally different!!! Nothing like the fakes at all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, Luffy. You are number nine.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, Shadup! How long are you gonna go on about that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come on, Luffy, everyone is waiting at the ship.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right!! Man, this is so great... it's been two whole years!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So the whole crew really is here on the archipelago!!...they're all alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: For everything you've done these past two years!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahahah... I thought I'd drop by and take a look...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...but it doesn't look like you need any help...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You have honed your strength still further...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...well, then... you had better be off. Your crew awaits...!

summary: Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji Break Through. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
